description: Data Flow from YOLOv5 Model to Background Subtraction (BS) is unclear.
Real-time collaboration and scalability are not explicitly handled by the system.
Low-latency and data flow from Gesture Recognition to Custom Gesture Actions are unclear.
Usability and Single-Hand Interaction are not explicitly handled by the system.
Security and data flow are not explicitly handled by the system.
Competitive price and hardware limitations are not explicitly handled by the system.
